Emmanuel","details":"Separation of concerns:      - LendingPool owns funds and loan state      - LoanManager is the authorized keeper that triggers state transitions      - Anyone can call processOverdueLoans() \u2014 permissionless keeper design      - Owner can set grace period and batch size parameters      Grace period: loans are not defaulted immediately after dueAt.      A configurable grace period allows late repayments before default.      This is important for real-world users who may miss by hours/days.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"getDefaultQueue(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"limit":"Max results","offset":"Start index"}},"isOverdue(uint256)":{"params":{"loanId":"The loan to check"},"returns":{"_0":"True if loan is active and past dueAt + gracePeriod"}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"processOverdueLoans()":{"details":"Permissionless keeper function \u2014 anyone can call this      Uses try/catch so one failure doesn't block the entire batch"},"queueForDefault(uint256)":{"details":"Permissionless \u2014 anyone can queue an overdue loan      This incentivizes keepers to monitor and queue loans","params":{"loanId":"The loan to queue"}},"removeFromQueue(uint256,string)":{"details":"Owner only \u2014 for edge cases where queue needs manual intervention"},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setGracePeriod(uint256)":{"params":{"newGracePeriod":"New grace period in seconds"}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"stateVariables":{"gracePeriod":{"details":"Default: 3 days. Governance can adjust."},"isQueuedForDefault":{"details":"loanId => true if queued"}},"title":"LoanManager","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"defaultQueueLength()":{"notice":"Get the current default queue length"},"getDefaultQueue(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Get a page of the default queue"},"gracePeriod()":{"notice":"Grace period after dueAt before a loan can be defaulted"},"isOverdue(uint256)":{"notice":"Check if a specific loan is overdue and eligible for queuing"},"isQueuedForDefault(uint256)":{"notice":"Tracks which loanIds have been queued for default processing"},"maxBatchSize()":{"notice":"Maximum loans processed in a single batch default call"},"processOverdueLoans()":{"notice":"Process all queued overdue loans up to maxBatchSize"},"queueForDefault(uint256)":{"notice":"Queue an overdue loan for default processing"},"removeFromQueue(uint256,string)":{"notice":"Manually remove a loan from the default queue"},"setGracePeriod(uint256)":{"notice":"Update the grace period before a loan can be defaulted"},"setMaxBatchSize(uint256)":{"notice":"Update the maximum batch size for default processing"}},"notice":"Keeper and lifecycle manager for VeraFlow loans. returns._0: True if loan is active and past dueAt + gracePeriod

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

processOverdueLoans().details: Permissionless keeper function — anyone can call this      Uses try/catch so one failure doesn't block the entire batch

queueForDefault(uint256).details: Permissionless — anyone can queue an overdue loan      This incentivizes keepers to monitor and queue loans

removeFromQueue(uint256,string).details: Owner only — for edge cases where queue needs manual intervention

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

defaultQueueLength().notice: Get the current default queue length

getDefaultQueue(uint256,uint256).notice: Get a page of the default queue

gracePeriod().notice: Grace period after dueAt before a loan can be defaulted

isOverdue(uint256).notice: Check if a specific loan is overdue and eligible for queuing

isQueuedForDefault(uint256).notice: Tracks which loanIds have been queued for default processing

maxBatchSize().notice: Maximum loans processed in a single batch default call

processOverdueLoans().notice: Process all queued overdue loans up to maxBatchSize

queueForDefault(uint256).notice: Queue an overdue loan for default processing

removeFromQueue(uint256,string).notice: Manually remove a loan from the default queue

setGracePeriod(uint256).notice: Update the grace period before a loan can be defaulted

setMaxBatchSize(uint256).notice: Update the maximum batch size for default processing
